title: Implement Session Persistence
description: Persist Claude conversation sessions across app restarts. Store session IDs and allow resuming previous conversations. Integrate with Claude CLI's session management if available, or implement custom persistence.
acceptance_criteria: Session ID stored on app close
Option to resume previous session on start
